call_graph_summary: TADSR_test.__init__ loads TimeAwareAutoencoderKL and immediately calls _init_tiled_vae.
_init_tiled_vae saves encoder/decoder original_forward and replaces encoder.forward / decoder.forward.
encode enters patched encoder.forward and can execute VAEHook.vae_tile_forward with time_vae=True.
decode enters patched decoder.forward, but official hook dispatches to decoder.original_forward because time_vae=False.

patch_targets.vae.encoder.forward: replaced with VAEHook(encoder, encoder_tile_size, is_decoder=False, time_vae=True)
patch_targets.vae.decoder.forward: replaced with VAEHook(decoder, decoder_tile_size, is_decoder=True, time_vae=False)
patch_targets.vae.encode: not directly patched; encode internally calls the patched encoder.forward
patch_targets.vae.decode: not directly patched; decode internally calls the patched decoder.forward
patch_targets.other_functions: no other VAE functions are patched by _init_tiled_vae

original_forward_saved.encoder: self.vae.encoder.original_forward stores the previous encoder.forward if absent
original_forward_saved.decoder: self.vae.decoder.original_forward stores the previous decoder.forward if absent

patch_targets.restore_api: no explicit restore method found in TADSR_test._init_tiled_vae

decoder_dispatch_probe.conclusion: official TADSR installs decoder VAEHook with time_vae=False, and VAEHook.__call__ dispatches to net.original_forward rather than vae_tile_forward for both tiny and large decoder inputs

encoder.input_range: official caller passes lq converted to model weight dtype; earlier preprocessing maps image range to [-1,1]
encoder.dtype: weight_dtype, float32 by default; fp16 if --mixed_precision fp16
encoder.timestep: required for TimeAware encoder; scalar or batch tensor expanded to batch in VAEHook.vae_tile_forward
encoder.tile_count_formula: ceil((H - 2*pad) / tile_size) by ceil((W - 2*pad) / tile_size), min 1 per dimension
encoder.real_tile_size: auto-adjusted by get_best_tile_size to divisor-friendly sizes
encoder.tile_call_path: VAEHook.vae_tile_forward builds a task queue for the encoder and executes tasks per tile
encoder.time_embedding: computed inside VAEHook.vae_tile_forward from net.time_proj and net.time_embedding
encoder.merge: crop_valid_region writes each tile result into the output tensor by output bounding boxes; no gaussian blend in this VAEHook implementation
encoder.output: encoder moments before quant_conv if patch target is encoder.forward; TimeAwareAutoencoderKL.encode then applies quant_conv and builds posterior
encoder.posterior_sampling: outside VAEHook in latent_dist.sample(); deterministic oracle should reconstruct mean + std * fixed epsilon after merged moments

decoder.decode_input_scaled: official pipeline passes x_denoised / scaling_factor to vae.decode
decoder.reason: decoder VAEHook is constructed with time_vae=False; VAEHook.__call__ returns net.original_forward(x) in both small and large branches when time_vae is false
decoder.sample_object_contract: vae.decode returns an object with .sample; VAEHook itself only replaces decoder.forward tensor path

tiled_boundary_contract.encoder_tiling_trigger: max(H, W) > pad * 2 + tile_size for VAEHook.__call__; however time_vae=True calls vae_tile_forward even when it prints tiny/unnecessary
tiled_boundary_contract.decoder_tiling_trigger: not reachable under official TADSR_test decoder hook because time_vae=False dispatches to net.original_forward for both tiny and large inputs

controlled_encoder_oracle_recommendation.reason: 96 > 32*2 + 16, so VAEHook.__call__ enters the large-input branch and vae_tile_forward for encoder

minimal_reproducible_size.decoder_blocker: Official _init_tiled_vae installs a decoder VAEHook, but the hook is constructed with time_vae=False and the VAEHook.__call__ source dispatches to net.original_forward instead of vae_tile_forward for decoder inputs. Therefore a truthful official tiled encode/decode oracle cannot claim tiled decode was triggered.

tiled_vs_nontiled_reference.reason: full official tiled encode/decode oracle is blocked by the decoder hook contract; do not force zero-error tiled vs non-tiled comparison

oracle_feasibility.reason: Official _init_tiled_vae installs a decoder VAEHook, but the hook is constructed with time_vae=False and the VAEHook.__call__ source dispatches to net.original_forward instead of vae_tile_forward for decoder inputs. Therefore a truthful official tiled encode/decode oracle cannot claim tiled decode was triggered.
oracle_feasibility.recommended_next_stage: Resolve whether the Jittor port should mirror official decoder.original_forward dispatch or intentionally implement a corrected decoder tiled path; until then implement only an audit/export blocker, not Jittor tiled VAE.
